description: Context for GKG SDLC indexing events (gkg_indexing_completed for SDLC data). One context per entity type per dispatch, carrying the per-run resource cost of indexing that entity.

namespace_id.description: Namespace being indexed (leaf of the traversal path). Null for globally-scoped entities that are not partitioned by namespace.

root_namespace_id.description: Top-level group of the namespace being indexed. Null for globally-scoped entities. Required for billing rollup and enterprise segmentation.

entity_type.description: SDLC entity type being indexed, e.g. MergeRequest, Issue, Pipeline.

indexing_mode.description: Whether the run was a full backfill or a watermark-incremental update.

dispatch_id.description: Correlates this event with the dispatch that triggered it.

campaign_id.description: Correlates a group of re-index dispatches (e.g. a schema-migration backfill). Null for routine dispatches.

read_rows.description: Rows read from the datalake (ClickHouse) for this entity, from the X-ClickHouse-Summary header.

read_bytes.description: Bytes read from the datalake for this entity, from the X-ClickHouse-Summary header.

written_rows.description: Rows written to the graph (nodes + edges) for this entity across all destination tables.

written_bytes.description: Approximate bytes written to the graph: the in-memory Arrow buffer size of written batches (the ClickHouse insert path exposes no wire-size summary). Use for relative trends, not exact storage cost.

duration_ms.description: End-to-end pipeline duration for this entity, in milliseconds. Denominator for derived throughput metrics (rows/sec, bytes/sec).
